title: India Search Reimagined
subtitle: Innovating information access for diverse Indian users, bridging digital divides.
problem_statement: Current search interfaces lack deep local context and intuitive discovery for India's diverse digital users.

approach.goal: Understand primary user needs for local information discovery in India.
approach.method_desc: Best for new market entry, uncovering unmet needs and cultural nuances.

pillars.title: Digital Divide
pillars.insight: Many users struggle with complex interfaces and English-centric content.

pillars.title: Local Relevance
pillars.insight: Users seek hyper-local, culturally specific information and services.

pillars.title: Language Barrier
pillars.insight: Diverse languages need seamless, accurate search experiences.

artifacts.label: Strategy
artifacts.title: Defining the Challenges
questions: How might we make information discovery more intuitive for all?
How might users find local services beyond basic search?
How might we integrate community knowledge into search results?

points.name: Google
points.desc: Broad search, less deep local context.

points.name: Justdial
points.desc: High local, moderate ease of use.

personas.name: Rohan Sharma
personas.quote: I need quick, reliable local business info.
personas.bio: Seeks efficient digital tools to grow his local electronics shop, often uses voice search.

personas.name: Priya Singh
personas.quote: Finding study material in Hindi is hard.
personas.bio: Navigates online for education and daily needs, prefers visual and voice input.

insights: Where can I find a plumber nearby?
I wish I could just speak my query.

points.action: Replace generic search with context-aware local discovery.
Integrate community forums with search results.
Adapt visual search for local product/service identification.
Modify search results to prioritize local language content.

pivot.before: Generic search results, often English-centric, lacking deep local context.
pivot.pivot_logic: Shift from keyword matching to intent-based, hyper-local, multilingual information synthesis.
pivot.after: Personalized, actionable local insights, seamlessly integrated with user's context.

annotations.title: Local Language Toggle
annotations.rationale: Make language options (from footer) more prominent for easy switching.

annotations.title: Visual Search Prompt
annotations.rationale: Integrate camera icon more visibly for object/text search on desktop.

annotations.title: Actionable Local Cards
annotations.rationale: Display local business info directly in results for direct action.

data.finding: Language options text is small, easily missed in footer.
Visual search (camera icon) on mobile, absent on desktop.
Lack of proactive guidance for complex queries.
Offers voice input and multiple language options.
